name: discover
invariants: output.ok !== true || output.result.worlds.every(w => typeof w.id === 'string' && typeof w.creatorId === 'string')
_note: world-creator.discover is the cross-creator public-world listing the DraftGallery 'Browse' panel drives. VISIBILITY ISOLATION is the load-bearing invariant: it walks every creator's drafts in STATE but only emits drafts with visibility === 'public' — private/unlisted drafts NEVER appear, even when the query string would otherwise match their name/description (pinned in server/tests/world-creator-lens.test.js: query 'vault' against a private 'Hidden Vault' returns count 0). Results are capped at 60 and sorted by updatedAt desc. With no STATE it returns ok:false 'STATE unavailable' (degrade-graceful, never throws). LENS_ACTIONS (path-3), not in the runMacro MACROS registry the assassin enumerates.
